creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Comment on attachment 150159
samba36/Makefile patch

Excellent patch.  Thank-you Hiroki, I've been struggling with heimdal and many of the ports that use it.  I think that this is the first time that I've actually seen a solution that should be applied consistenly across the portfolio.  

Samba36 builds successfully on i386 and amd64 on FreeBSD10.1, using both heimdal1.5.2 and heimdal1.5.3 (as expected) ;)

I like the way you integrated --with|--without-ads

I hope that Timur accepts your nice solution.
